name: BetterCookingPriority
author: Gemini Modder
description: Increases the priority of food production tasks in the auto-production system to prevent starvation in large bases.

settings.name: Base Food Priority
settings.description: The base score bonus added to all food-related tasks.

settings.name: Carry Hunger Bonus
settings.description: Additional priority for carrying ingredients, scaled by how hungry the gnome is.

settings.name: Production Health Bonus
settings.description: Additional priority for cooking tasks, scaled by how well-fed (healthy) the gnome is.

settings.name: Starvation Threshold
settings.description: Nutrition level (0.0-1.0) below which a gnome is considered 'starving'.

settings.name: Starvation Escalation
settings.description: A massive priority boost triggered when anyone in the colony is starving.
